changes.reason: Restores the structure-confirmed charm-wall admission box that historically separated the clean breakaway regime from weaker wall touches without using global vetoes.
Requires a confirmed higher-low base for this profile; prior memory shows the 1.0 grid value improved objective and reduced tail exposure from a weaker branch.
Allows the profitable supported extension sleeve up to the tested 25-point charm-wall distance instead of over-constraining the rare convex breakaway trades.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should recover the higher-scoring charm-wall structure-confirmed branch while preserving core pullback, charm-pin, squeeze, no-0DTE, and 1DTE flows. Expected upside is better total net profit and growth quality from cleaner charm-wall breakaway attribution; tradeoff is small-sample risk and possible retained worst MAE if the call-wall tail remains unchanged.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long as the next isolated family. The current base still shows charm_wall_breakaway_long enabled but less structurally confirmed than the best historical branch. Experiment memory shows this exact mechanism improved objective materially from a weak tail branch, with net profit up, trade count up, slow trades removed, and worst MAE dramatically improved. This avoids repeating the failed run_056 global extended-VWAP veto widening and does not suppress the call-wall convex winner directly.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long is a high-efficiency VALID_0DTE sleeve: 5 trades, $574 PnL, $503.6 per exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades. Prior structure-confirmed charm-wall experiments were among the strongest objective improvers.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Structure-Confirmed Extension Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample; stricter structure can cannibalize or miss rare breakaway winners, while the global worst MAE may remain dominated by call_wall_acceptance_long.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway with price above charm wall, breakout required, and ES higher-high/higher-low confirmation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Total score and net profit improve versus run_044/current leader, charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL per exposure remains strong, completed trades stay within 10% of baseline, and slow_12h remains zero.
